content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09A","process_rule":"1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09A named J09A_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
   Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09A_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the the internal team to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING entries from the table as CSV file named J09A including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
11. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
12. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09A named J09A_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
   Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09A_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the the internal team to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING entries from the table as CSV file named J09A including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
11. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
12. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data.

EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number

SURNAME (TEXT) Last name/surname
STREET (TEXT) Street name
STREETNO (TEXT) Street number
CITY1 (TEXT) City name
CITY2 (TEXT) District/additional city information
POST_CODE1 (INTEGER) Postal code
EMAIL (TEXT) Email address

# Table: sales_master
## column_name (type) description
EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number
TITLE (TEXT) Title (Mr., Mrs., Dr., etc.)
FORENAME (TEXT) First name
SURNAME (TEXT) Last name/surname
STREET (TEXT) Street name
STREETNO (TEXT) Street number
CITY1 (TEXT) City name
CITY2 (TEXT) District/additional city information
POST_CODE1 (INTEGER) Postal code
EMAIL (TEXT) Email address

# Table: decision_table
## column_name (type) description
HAUS (TEXT) House identifier
ANLAGE (TEXT) Installation/facility identifier
ABLEINH (TEXT) Reading unit identifier
TOUR (TEXT) Tour/route identifier
ME_MA_ID (TEXT) Meter/Measuring point ID
CITY1 (TEXT) City name
CITY2 (TEXT) District/additional city information
HOUSE_NUM1 (INTEGER) House/building number
POST_CODE1 (INTEGER) Postal code
EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number

# Table: eabl
## column_name (type) description
Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No. (TEXT) Meter Reading Document Number
EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number
Geplante Ableseart (INTEGER) Planned reading type
MR type (TEXT) Meter reading type code
MR TYPE TEXT (TEXT) Meter Reading type description
MR category (TEXT) Meter reading category
ISTABLART_TXT (TEXT) Actual reading type description (SAP)
LOGIKZW (TEXT) Logic indicator
KENNZIFF (TEXT) Identification number
Record created on (TEXT) Record creation date
Object changed on (TEXT) Object modification date

# Table: eablg
## column_name (type) description
Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No. (TEXT) Meter Reading Document Number
Installation (TEXT) Installation identifier
Meter Reading reason (INTEGER) Meter reading reason code
MR Reason - Text (TEXT) Meter reading reason description
Scheduled MR Date (TEXT) Scheduled meter reading date
Meter Reading unit (TEXT) Meter reading unit
Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No..1 (INTEGER) Secondary/duplicate Meter Reading Document Number

# Table: eanl
## column_name (type) description
Installation (TEXT) Installation identifier
Installation type (TEXT) Type of installation
Record created on (TEXT) Record creation date
Object changed on (TEXT) Object modification date
SPARTE_TEXT (TEXT) Division/sector description
AKLASSE (TEXT) Customer class code
AKLASSE_TEXT (TEXT) Customer class description
TARIFTYP (TEXT) Tariff type code
TARIFTYP_TEXT (TEXT) Tariff type description
BRANCHE (TEXT) Industry/sector code
BRANCHE_TEXT (TEXT) Industry/sector description
ABLEINH (TEXT) Reading unit identifier
ME_MA_ID (TEXT) Meter/Measuring point ID
HAUS (TEXT) House identifier

# Table: process_rules
## column_name (type) description
process_rule_id (TEXT) PRIMARY KEY - Process rule identifier
process_rule (TEXT) NOT NULL - Process rule text/description"}

## column_name (type) description

CITY2 (TEXT) District/additional city information

# Table: decision_table

# Table: eabl
## column_name (type) description

Geplante Ableseart (INTEGER) Planned reading type

Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No..1 (INTEGER) Secondary/duplicate Meter Reading Document Number

# Table: eanl

# Table: process_rules
## column_name (type) description
process_rule_id (TEXT) PRIMARY KEY - Process rule identifier
process_rule (TEXT) NOT NULL - Process rule text/description

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09A_temp; CREATE TABLE J09A_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09A%'; ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM J09A_temp;

content.text: {"success":false,"error":"You can only execute one statement at a time.","message":"SQL execution failed"}

structured_content.error: You can only execute one statement at a time.

args.sqlite_command: CREATE TABLE J09A_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09A%'
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT
UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN HAUS IN (SELECT HAUS FROM J09A_temp GROUP BY HAUS HAVING COUNT(EQUNR) < 3) THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END

UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld') OR CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld')
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." TEXT
UPDATE J09A_temp SET "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." = (SELECT eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." FROM eablg WHERE eablg.Installation = J09A_temp.ANLAGE LIMIT 1)
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN TITLE TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN FORENAME TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN SURNAME TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN STREET TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN STREETNO TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN EMAIL TEXT

UPDATE J09A_temp SET TITLE = COALESCE((SELECT s.TITLE FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1),(SELECT n.TITLE FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), FORENAME = COALESCE((SELECT s.FORENAME FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1),(SELECT n.FORENAME FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), SURNAME = COALESCE((SELECT s.SURNAME FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1),(SELECT n.SURNAME FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), STREET = COALESCE((SELECT s.STREET FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1),(SELECT n.STREET FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), STREETNO = COALESCE((SELECT s.STREETNO FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1),(SELECT n.STREETNO FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), POST_CODE1 = COALESCE((SELECT s.POST_CODE1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1),(SELECT n.POST_CODE1 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1),POST_CODE1), CITY1 = COALESCE((SELECT s.CITY1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1),(SELECT n.CITY1 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1),CITY1), CITY2 = COALESCE((SELECT s.CITY2 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1),(SELECT n.CITY2 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1),CITY2), EMAIL = COALESCE((SELECT s.EMAIL FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1),(SELECT n.EMAIL FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1))

UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2024' INTERSECT SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2023')

args.sql_query: SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09A_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09A_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG <> 'MANDATORY_READING'

args.email: Please find attached the J09A mandatory reading entries.
Please find attached the J09A meter reading entries excluding mandatory reading.
